name: diagGetTargetGroupName
title: diagGetTargetGroupName
syntax: long DiagGetTargetGroupName(char ecuQualifier[], dword bitPos, char groupNameOut[]);
description: Returns the name of the diagnostic target group for which the bit at the given position is used by diagGetAssignedTargetGroups. If the target ECU is not specified explicitly, the target selected with diagSetTarget is used.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Use this diagnostic target, not that selected with DiagSetTarget.

parameters.name: bitPos
parameters.description: Position of the bit in the bit mask returned by DiagGetAssignedTargetGroups.

parameters.name: groupNameOut
parameters.description: The name of the target group is written to this field in the CAPL file's encoding.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
